message:
feat(html_export): enhance renderer and styles; update gitignore

HTML Export improvements:
- renderer.rs: Updates to HTML export rendering logic
- styles.rs: Style enhancements for exported HTML

Gitignore updates:
- Add "Google Chrome_*.png" pattern for Chrome screenshots with spaces
- Add "*_screenshot*.png" pattern for general screenshot artifacts

These screenshot files are ephemeral debug artifacts that should not
be committed to the repository.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,6 +72,8 @@ claude_subagents_*.html
 
 # Browser screenshots (ephemeral debug artifacts)
 Chrome_*.png
+Google Chrome_*.png
+*_screenshot*.png
 
 # HTML export drafts
 world_class_export.html
